visa_types.name: National D visa
visa_types.overview:
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 days and less than six months (student exchange, short-term study) per year and you are neither EU, or EFTA citizen, you require an Austrian national
                                                            visa (Visa D).
According to the Schengen Visa Code the holder of a national visa issued by Austria or other Schengen-country is entitled to travel in other Schengen-countries for a maximum of 90 days within a 6-months
                                                            period (i.e. the maximum validity of the Austrian visa D).
Download the form of application for D visa.  
Note: Visa Service Centres do not accept applications for type D visa. You need to apply directly at the Embassy of Austria in Baku (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/en/austrian-embassy-baku).
visa_types.full_text:
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 days and less than six months (student exchange, short-term study) per year and you are neither EU, or EFTA citizen, you require an Austrian national
                                                            visa (Visa D).
According to the Schengen Visa Code the holder of a national visa issued by Austria or other Schengen-country is entitled to travel in other Schengen-countries for a maximum of 90 days within a 6-months
                                                            period (i.e. the maximum validity of the Austrian visa D).
Download the form of application for D visa.  
Note: Visa Service Centres do not accept applications for type D visa. You need to apply directly at the Embassy of Austria in Baku (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/en/austrian-embassy-baku).
